commit_scope: Expose graph-node get/list/count behavior as a Form-native port over the existing storage-port carriers.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/cell-log-store.fk form-stdlib/storage-port.fk form-stdlib/storage-port-file.fk form-stdlib/graph-node-port.fk form-stdlib/tests/graph-node-port-band.fk
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_graph_node_form_port.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_commit_evidence_validator.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_graph_node_form_port.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py
local_validation.summary: form/form-stdlib/graph-node-port.fk now exposes gn-put-node, gn-get-node, gn-node-exists?, gn-count-nodes, gn-list-node-ids, and gn-list-nodes over storage-port carriers. The native graph-node band returned 11111 across memory and durable file carriers, including a reopen proof for typed idea counts and node lists. The ideas router gap wording now reflects that graph-node read shape exists; public API schema projection remains the next boundary.

known_limitations.observed: This slice proves graph-node behavior over memory and file carriers. A live Postgres graph-node carrier is tracked as follow-up graph-node-form-postgres-carrier.
No public FastAPI graph or ideas response schema changed in this slice. Native graph-node HTTP projection is tracked as follow-up ideas-native-graph-node-read-route.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of the graph-node Form port commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted for this Form stdlib carrier slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form can now create, update, retype, get, count, and list graph nodes by type through a carrier-agnostic port. The same graph-node contract runs over memory and durable file storage; existing public graph and ideas APIs keep their current Python behavior until schema projection lands.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/cell-log-store.fk form-stdlib/storage-port.fk form-stdlib/storage-port-file.fk form-stdlib/graph-node-port.fk form-stdlib/tests/graph-node-port-band.fk -> 11111
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_graph_node_form_port.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_commit_evidence_validator.py -> 18 passed
make wellness -> every claimed symbol resolves

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; CI and deployment validation remain pending.
